summary: Architectural RCP (A4.12) and mechanical chilled-water main (M4.04) conflict in the Data Hall A north corridor; routing above the ceiling further conflicts with the structural beam pocket on S3.04. CMU top-out next Tuesday creates a hard coordination deadline this Friday.
key_questions: Is a corridor ceiling-height drop to 13'-6" AFF acceptable?
Can the 36" chilled-water main be re-routed above the architectural ceiling at 15'-0" AFF given the S3.04 beam pocket?
If neither option is acceptable, is a design change required?

citations.ref: A4.12 RCP — Data Hall A north corridor
